scripts.docker:restart: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.test.yml down && docker compose up -d
scripts.test:e2e: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.test.yml exec playwright npx playwright test
scripts.migrate: docker compose exec php php bin/migrate.php
scripts.seed: docker compose exec php php bin/seed-terrain-types.php
scripts.backfill:tournament-metadata: docker compose exec php php bin/backfill-tournament-metadata.php
